Sars..Bladder: Catarrh of the bladder and kidneys.
Sars..Bladder, urination, frequent: must pass urine several times in a night; urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed
Sars..Chest: suffocation on the least exertion; always tired
Sars..Extremities: Oedema of tissues, of lower extremities, pitting on pressure dropsical conditions; Bright's disease.
Sars..Generalities: Weakness over the whole body; a paralytic feeling.
Sars..Head: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
Sars..Mind: In the mental sphere it manifests itself in a dazed state, he is unable to comprehend, the mind is slow, it is a weakness bordering on imbecility, which in the end it may reach.
Sars..Mouth: The throat, tongue, and mouth look as if about to ulcerate; purple spots look as if they would break down, but remain intact for weeks and months.
Sars..Rectum: during stool, violent tearing, cutting, in the rectum.
Sars..Rectum, constipation: Obstinate constipation with violent urging to urinate; urging top stool with contraction of the intestines; excessive pressure from above downward, as if the bowels were pressing out
Sars..Skin: Moist, itching, scurfy, and scabby eruptions. The skin of the backs and the palms of the hands becomes thick and indurated with a bran like scurf resembling psoriasis, intermingling with blue spots.
Sars..Bladder, urination: There is a spasmodic condition of the sphincter when sitting to urinate, which makes the act impossible in that position, but when he stands up the urine flows freely.
Sars..Generalities, side: sudden paralytic weakness of left arm and leg, passed off in three hours leaving a numbness in left hand and a tearing pain in left side of face and head
Sars..Clinical: This medicine has many times dissolved a stone in the bladder; it so changes the character of the urine that it is no longer possible for the stone to build up, and it grows smaller by the continual dissolving off from the surface.
Sars..Abdomen: Flatulence, continuous nausea, eructations and vomiting of sour food. Always complaining of fermentation and uneasiness of the stomach as if he had overeaten or as if the food had spoiled; digestion is slow and feeble.
Sars..Heart & Circulation: the heart palpitates on exertion; suffocation on the least exertion
Sars..Face: The face is often red and discolored in patches.
Sars..Head, pain: feeling on the top of the head as if struck with a hammer
Sars..Bladder, urination, retarded: Frequent ineffectual urging to urinate with diminished secretion,
Sars..Extremities, pain: Sars. has gouty nodes with extreme soreness.
Sars..Urine: I have seen the high colored, bloody, and mucous urine cleared up after the administration of Sars., but on standing, the sand would appear.
Sars..Urine, color: urine thick and cloudy after standing; but clear when first passed
